activeGoal.title: Keep Circuit Breaker playable, discoverable, private, and releasable
outcomes: Preserve correct and responsive core block-stacker gameplay.
Maintain accurate canonical, social, structured-data, sitemap, and crawl assets.
Keep telemetry constrained to the approved production page-view contract.
Maintain a green typecheck, test, build, and artifact-validation gate.

nextGoals: Improve boss-rush clarity and game feel without weakening the core rules.
Maintain a lightweight static deployment with zero runtime dependencies.
